Ntc Of Mtn For Entry Of Default Judgment
Off Calendar Jul-11-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos and Mars Goodman, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Patrick Talbot Hall, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Granite Creditors Service, Inc.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Mary Molloy.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

Witness Steven A. Wright sworn and examined on behalf of the Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $ 5,644.00
Pre-Judgment Interest at the annual rate of 10%: $1,450.00
Attorney's Fees: $2,309.00
Costs: $0.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $9,403.00
Judgment signed in open court.
